mapper.sql: id, user_id, plan_id, phase_index, problem_slug, practice_session_id, version_no, user_message_id, assistant_message_id, agent_run_id, raw_code, normalized_code, language, detection_evidence_json, context_summary, total_score, correctness_score, complexity_score, edge_case_score, code_quality_score, problem_fit_score, passed, deduction_reasons_json, improvement_suggestions_json, review_markdown, created_at
id, version_no, language, total_score, passed, created_at
mapper.select: SELECT id, plan_id, phase_index, problem_slug FROM practice_session WHERE id = #{sessionId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' FOR UPDATE

WITH next_version AS ( SELECT COALESCE(MAX(version_no), 0) + 1 AS version_no FROM practice_code_review WHERE practice_session_id = #{sessionId} ) INSERT INTO practice_code_review ( user_id, plan_id, phase_index, problem_slug, practice_session_id, version_no, user_message_id, assistant_message_id, agent_run_id, raw_code, normalized_code, language, detection_evidence_json, context_summary, total_score, correctness_score, complexity_score, edge_case_score, code_quality_score, problem_fit_score, passed, deduction_reasons_json, improvement_suggestions_json, review_markdown ) SELECT #{userId}, #{planId}, #{phaseIndex}, #{problemSlug}, #{sessionId}, next_version.version_no, #{userMessageId}, #{assistantMessageId}, #{agentRunDbId}, #{rawCode}, #{normalizedCode}, #{language}, #{detectionEvidenceJson, typeHandler=org.congcong.algomentor.agent.persistence.postgres.json.JsonbTypeHandler}, #{contextSummary}, #{totalScore}, #{correctnessScore}, #{complexityScore}, #{edgeCaseScore}, #{codeQualityScore}, #{problemFitScore}, #{passed}, #{deductionReasonsJson, typeHandler=org.congcong.algomentor.agent.persistence.postgres.json.JsonbTypeHandler}, #{improvementSuggestionsJson, typeHandler=org.congcong.algomentor.agent.persistence.postgres.json.JsonbTypeHandler}, #{reviewMarkdown} FROM next_version ON CONFLICT (practice_session_id, user_message_id) DO UPDATE SET raw_code = practice_code_review.raw_code RETURNING
